title: dillwynia glaucula
intro: Dillwynia glaucula is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a shrubby pea or native pea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dillwynia glaucula include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Dillwynia glaucula can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
